particulars.description: The company (with full title guarantee) hereby. Charges to the lender:. 1. by way of first fixed equitable charge all land which the company acquires in the future;. 2. by way of separate first fixed charges:. 2.1 all the goodwill of the company, present or future;. 2.2 the securities;. 2.3 the insurances;. 2.4 the intellectual property;. 2.5 the debts;. 2.6 the rents;. 2.7 the asset contracts;. 2.8 the other claims;. 2.9 the fixed plant and equipment;. 2.10 the loose plant and equipment; and. 2.11 the amount from time to time standing to the credit of the account.
